# Tori Coltman

Base URL: https://uthrofazeroth.github.io/tori-coltman/
Site type: public author website

Summary:
Tori Coltman writes emotionally grounded contemporary love stories shaped by timing, closeness, class, cities, second chances, and change.

Primary pages:
- / : homepage and featured books
- /about/ : author bio and positioning
- /books/ : full books index
- /books/thirty-minutes/ : Thirty Minutes title page
- /books/before-winter/ : Before Winter title page
- /books/when-summer-ends/ : When Summer Ends title page
- /books/the-man-in-plain-sight/ : The Man in Plain Sight title page
- /books/slipstream/ : Slipstream title page
- /books/no-safe-distance/ : No Safe Distance title page
- /books/the-city-that-waited/ : The City That Waited title page
- /books/what-washington-keeps/ : What Washington Keeps title page
- /books/one-night-in-paris/ : One Night in Paris title page
- /books/when-the-ferries-come-home/ : When the Ferries Come Home title page
- /books/home-after-all/ : Home After All title page
- /books/fire-in-the-windows/ : Fire in the Windows title page
- /books/the-things-we-tried-to-save/ : The Things We Tried to Save title page
- /books/house-lights-off/ : House Lights Off title page
- /books/nobodys-daughter/ : Nobody's Daughter title page
- /books/silver-in-the-rain/ : Silver in the Rain title page
- /books/gold-weather/ : Gold Weather title page
- /information/ : site information
- /privacy/ : privacy note

Standalone books:
- Thirty Minutes
- Before Winter
- When Summer Ends
- The Man in Plain Sight
- Slipstream
- No Safe Distance

Cities of Exile:
- Book 1: The City That Waited
- Book 2: What Washington Keeps
- Book 3: One Night in Paris
- Book 4: When the Ferries Come Home
- Book 5: Home After All

The Last Bright Things:
- Book 1: Fire in the Windows
- Book 2: The Things We Tried to Save
- Book 3: House Lights Off
- Book 4: Nobody's Daughter
- Book 5: Silver in the Rain
- Book 6: Gold Weather

Public contact:
- No public direct contact email is currently listed on the site.
